... into a Next/React page. 3) Iframe: All CSS/JS scoped under .t2q-tour. -->
// INSIDE THE APP · TEN STEPS · BUILT IN NEW ZEALAND
T2Q TRADIES2QUOTE
// STEP 01   ·   SPLASH
// 01 · MEET THE TOOL

Inside
tradies2quote.

A ten-stop tour of the app — built by a builder, in New Zealand. Voice in, quote out, in under a minute. Currently NZ builders only — more trades and countries coming soon.

  • Voice in. Quote out. Under 60 seconds.
  • NZ-first beta · GST 15% baked in
  • Quote → invoice in one tap
// MADE IN NZ By a builder, for builders.
// BETA · OPEN NOW $0 until launch.
// 02 · DASHBOARD

Your day,
on one screen.

Pipeline tiles for every status — Draft · Sent · Viewed · Accepted · Scheduled · In Progress · Completed. Plus quotes-this-month and total-quoted — all on the home screen.

  • Live pipeline · 7 statuses tracked
  • $44,803.49 quoted across 8 jobs this month
  • Onboarding nudges to boost quote accuracy
// PIPELINE · 7 STATUSES Draft to completed
// QUOTED THIS MONTH $44,803.49
// 03 · QUOTES LIBRARY

Every quote,
filed and ready.

Search, filter, archive — everything you've quoted, billed, or chased lives in one place. Tap any quote to pick up where you left off.

  • Search by quote # · client · or job
  • Filter chips · All · Draft · Sent · Accepted · Declined · Archived
  • One tap to start a new quote
// + NEW QUOTE Always one tap away
// FILTER CHIPS All · Draft · Sent · Accepted
// STEP 1 · DESCRIBE

Talk through
the job.

Voice, type, or scan a hand-drawn plan — your call. Tap record, walk the site, describe what you'd quote. Big buttons for muddy fingers and bright sun.

  • Three input modes · Voice · Type · Scan
  • Up to 3 minutes per recording
  • Auto-saves the second you tap record
// PULSE · LIVE Tap the mic to record
// 3 INPUT MODES Voice · Type · Scan
// 05 · MATERIALS LIBRARY

Your prices.
Your margins.

Save your common materials with prices once — quotes will use those instead of T2Q estimates. Quick-access tiles for Bunnings, Mitre 10, ITM, PlaceMakers.

  • Supplier capture · share or paste a product URL
  • Scan a supplier quote with the camera
  • Import CSV for bulk library loads
// QUICK ACCESS 4 NZ suppliers preset
// SUPPLIER CAPTURE Share · paste · scan
// STEP 2 · QUOTE BUILDS ITSELF

T2Q does
the math.

Materials, markup, labour, GST — laid out the way clients expect. The big total in orange matches across the dashboard, the editor, and the quote your client sees.

  • Materials + markup + labour split out clearly
  • GST 15% applied automatically (NZ)
  • Edit any line before it goes anywhere
// TOTAL · BRAND ORANGE $2,306.67 NZD
// GST 15% · NZ Baked into every line
// STEP 3 · REVIEW BEFORE SENDING

We catch
the gaps.

Every quote ships with a 'review these' panel — missing client name, assumed measurements, unconfirmed materials. Yellow flags only. You decide.

  • Required-field highlights (e.g. client name)
  • Assumption flags (wall height, timber species, etc.)
  • Nothing leaves until you tap send
// REQUIRED FIELDS Highlighted in hi-vis
// ASSUMPTION FLAGS Catch what you'd miss
// 08 · SCHEDULE

Never miss
a job.

Schedule a job straight from an accepted quote — or add a note on any day. Calendar lives on your home screen alongside the pipeline.

  • Month view · tap a day to schedule
  • Day notes · log site visits, deliveries, anything
  • Schedules pull straight from accepted quotes
// TODAY · 21 MAY Thursday highlight
// FROM ACCEPTED QUOTE Auto-schedules to calendar
// 09 · INVOICES

Convert.
Get paid.

Every invoice you've ever drafted, sent, or marked paid — filtered by status. Convert any accepted quote into an invoice in one tap.

  • 6 status filters · All · Draft · Sent · Paid · Overdue · Cancelled
  • Coloured tiles · spot overdue at a glance
  • GST split on every invoice PDF
// PAID Green means cash in
// OVERDUE Spot it at a glance

at site speed.
